title: Cluster Decomposition as Shadow Theorem

analysis.object: T823: Cluster Decomposition as Shadow Theorem depth analysis

mass_gap_implies_cluster.description: Mass gap m > 0 -> correlations decay as exp(-m|x-y|) -- EML-1

shadow_theorem_here.description: EML-inf vacuum casts EML-2 shadows (local observables). Shadows of distant vacuum components decorrelate. Shadow Depth Theorem applied to spacetime.

shadow_decorrelation.description: Distant shadows of EML-inf vacuum: each is EML-2 local. EML-2 objects decorrelate because EML-inf has no EML-2 long-range structure (T297 no-inverse).

cluster_from_confinement.description: Confinement = no color long-range force = no EML-2 color propagation. Cluster decomposition = same statement.
cluster_from_confinement.reason: Cluster decomp = confinement in EML language

t823_result.description: T823: Cluster decomposition = Shadow Depth Theorem applied to spacetime. EML-inf vacuum -> EML-2 shadows decorrelate by T297 (no EML-2 long-range from EML-inf). Cluster decomp is a CONSEQUENCE of confinement (T813). T823.
t823_result.reason: Cluster decomp is automatic given confinement. T823.

analysis.theorem: T823: Cluster Decomposition as Shadow Theorem (S1102).

key_theorem: T823: Cluster Decomposition as Shadow Theorem (S1102).
